cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Call us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From custom cabinetry to outdoor decks, Zetino Carpenter Inc offers a full range of carpentry services in Mesquite, TX. Every project is handled with precision, quality materials, and a commitment to your satisfaction.

services.title: Custom Cabinets
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, functional cabinets built to your exact specifications.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service transforms your kitchen, bathroom, or any room with storage that's both beautiful and practical. We work with you to design and build cabinets that fit your space perfectly, using premium hardwoods and modern finishes. Every cabinet features soft-close hardware and meticulous craftsmanship.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet with you to understand your needs, style, and budget.

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: Our team creates detailed plans and 3D renderings for your approval.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We build and install your cabinets with precision, ensuring a perfect fit.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet installation take?
faqs.answer: Most kitchen cabinet projects take 2-4 weeks from design to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer custom finishes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of stains, paints, and hardware options to match your style.

services.title: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Create your dream outdoor living space with a custom deck or patio.
services.longDescription: Expand your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio from Zetino Carpenter Inc. We design and build decks that complement your home and lifestyle, using pressure-treated lumber, composite materials, or a combination. Our decks include built-in seating, planters, and lighting options for the ultimate outdoor experience.

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We assess your yard, sun exposure, and soil conditions.

process.title: Custom Design
process.description: We create a deck layout that fits your space and needs.

process.title: Construction & Finish
process.description: Our team builds your deck with care, applying stain or sealant for protection.

faqs.question: What materials do you recommend for decks?
faqs.answer: We recommend pressure-treated pine for affordability or composite for low maintenance.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits for your deck project.

services.title: Trim & Crown Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance and character with custom trim and molding.
services.longDescription: Transform the look of any room with expertly installed trim, crown molding, and baseboards. Our trim work adds architectural interest and a finished look to your home. We offer a variety of profiles and wood species to match your decor, from simple colonial to ornate Victorian styles.

process.title: Measurement & Design
process.description: We measure your rooms and help select molding profiles.

process.title: Cutting & Fitting
process.description: Our carpenters precisely cut and fit each piece for seamless joints.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: We install and finish the trim with caulk, paint, or stain.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or create custom designs.

faqs.question: How long does trim installation take?
faqs.answer: A typical room takes 1-2 days, depending on complexity.

services.title: Custom Shelving & Built-ins
services.shortDescription: Maximize space with custom shelving and built-in units.
services.longDescription: Our custom shelving and built-in solutions turn empty walls into functional storage and display areas. Whether you need a home library, entertainment center, or closet system, we design and build units that fit your space perfectly. We use high-quality materials and finish options to match your existing decor.

process.title: Needs Assessment
process.description: We discuss your storage needs and design preferences.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: Our team creates a design with detailed measurements and material choices.

process.title: Build & Install
process.description: We construct and install your shelving with precision and care.

faqs.question: What materials do you use for shelving?
faqs.answer: We use plywood, solid wood, and MDF with various finishes.

faqs.question: Can you build around existing features?
faqs.answer: Yes, we custom-fit shelving around windows, doors, and sloped ceilings.

about.headline: Crafting Quality Since 2008
about.mission: To provide exceptional carpentry services that enhance homes and exceed expectations, with a focus on quality, integrity, and customer satisfaction.
story: Zetino Carpenter Inc was founded in 2008 with a simple mission: bring expert craftsmanship to Mesquite homes. What started as a one-man operation has grown into a trusted team of skilled carpenters, but our commitment to quality has never changed. We take pride in every cut, every joint, and every finish.

Over the years, we've completed hundreds of projects — from custom cabinets to outdoor decks — earning a reputation for reliability and attention to detail. We believe in building relationships as strong as the structures we create, and we treat every home like our own.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in precise, high-quality work that stands the test of time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and doing what we promise.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision is our priority. We listen, advise, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving Mesquite and supporting our local community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call or fill out our form for a free estimate.
